name: Skeletal Guardian
description: An animated skeleton in corroded Eltharan armour. Empty eye sockets glow with faint green light.

start.text: T-t-turn... back... the living... must not... enter...
start.narrative: The skeletal guardian raises a rusted sword with jerky, unnatural movements. Ancient magic animates its bones.

warning.text: The... master... stirs... the seals... weaken... flee... while you... can...
warning.narrative: For a moment, something almost like sorrow flickers in its empty eyes.

responses.text: I'll be the judge of that.
